## Summary

Describe the change in a few lines.

## Change Type

- [ ] Content addition or revision
- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Source or citation improvement
- [ ] Frontend / build / tooling change
- [ ] Skill / schema / validator change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checks

- [ ] I kept the change focused.
- [ ] I added or updated sources where needed.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks locally.
- [ ] I did not modify unrelated generated or archived files.

## Verification

List the commands you ran, if any.

```bash
npm run build
```

## Notes

Add anything reviewers should pay attention to.
